actions.narration: Okay, let's see... DreamDuo... Tasks page. I'm already seeing a 'Tasks' heading, so that's promising. Looks like a calendar view, dashboard link, and some category options... This could be useful if it's organized well.
Ah, it says 'Welcome back! Successfully logged in to Survey Corps.' That's odd. I didn't log in. Survey Corps? I wasn't expecting that name. Confusing.

Okay, I see 'Add Category', 'List View', 'Canvas View'... lots of different ways to view things. Good! Filters for Categories, Priorities, and Deadline. This looks comprehensive, if a bit overwhelming at first glance.
It also has a loading indicator. Hmm.. It is stuck on loading.. I am logged in but there are no tasks here.

friction_points: Unexpected login and name: 'Successfully logged in to Survey Corps' without explicitly logging in.
